scope_caveats: (s1) PREDICTED-ONLY view: EVERY cell is predicted_input=true — a CITED Q_α band MIDPOINT from arxiv mass-model literature, NOT measurement. This is sim-composed-with-sim (predicted Q_α → semi-empirical T). 'Z=119/120 후보일 가능성' != '후보임' != '발견됨'.
(s2) Q_α is mass-model dependent (ΔQ_α ~0.3-1.0 MeV across FRDM/WS4/SkyHFB/KTUY/BSk; note §3.1). The band width IS the honest uncertainty; only the midpoint is scored. @D d6: no forced number.

(s3) All Z=119/120 cells are odd-A or odd-odd; they carry model_validity_flag=odd-A-hindrance-not-modeled (G2), so a low/zero composite is an honest hindrance-uncaptured signal, NOT a true SF collapse. 295-120 c_total=0 is the Ren-Xu in-band SF tail (@D d2).
(s4) absorbed=false 永久 (R4). 2026-05 현재 Z=119/120 confirmed discovery 0건 (RIKEN/Berkeley/JINR 모두 진행중/착수예정; note §2). This is an accelerator beam-time PRIORITY hint, not a discovery.

recommendation: G4 PREDICTED-ONLY accelerator beam-time priority shortlist — the genuinely NOVEL Z=119/120 discovery candidates with the known anchors removed. absorbed=true requires GSI/JINR/RIKEN beam + SHIP/DGFRS/GARIS detection + IUPAC priority — none from sim (NUCLEAR.md 7). '가능성' != '임'.
